title: Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area (FSA) - Canada.ca
content:
## Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area (FSA)
Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area data present personal income tax data based on forward sortation areas. The statistics are compiled by province and territory, as well as for all of Canada. These data tables provide income statistics, Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) statistics, Goods and Services Tax/Harmonized Sales Tax (GST/HST) credit statistics, Child Care Benefit (CCB) statistics by specific geographic area, income range, source of income, age and gender.
- 2023 Edition (2021 tax year)
- 2022 Edition (2020 tax year)
- 2021 Edition (2019 tax year)
- 2020 Edition (2018 tax year)
- 2019 Edition (2017 tax year)
- 2018 Edition (2016 tax year)
- 2017 Edition (2015 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
